title: Crunchy Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A flavorful and crunchy twist on traditional Mexican tacos, made with crispy chicken, crunchy slaw, and fresh cilantro.
instructions: Season the chicken with Mexican seasoning and cook in a skillet over medium-high heat for 5-7 minutes per side or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, combine the red cabbage, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice in a bowl.
Slice the cooked chicken into thin strips and place on a platter.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of chicken on each tortilla, followed by a spoonful of the slaw.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
Serve with additional lime wedges and hot sauce, if desired.
